title: Steamed Monkfish with Yorkshire Pudding Crust
description: A unique twist on traditional British cuisine, combining the delicate flavors of monkfish with the crispy goodness of Yorkshire pudding.
instructions: Whisk eggs, milk, and hot sauce in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, combine flour, British seasoning, and yogurt (if using).
Pour wet ingredients into dry ingredients and mix until smooth.
Pour mixture into a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
While Yorkshire pudding is baking, prepare monkfish by patting dry with paper towels.
Season monkfish with salt and pepper to taste.
Place monkfish fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle with vegetable oil and bake in oven for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
To serve, place steamed monkfish on top of Yorkshire pudding and garnish with chopped scallions (if desired).
